title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Freshworks - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Freshworks in Srinagar offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Freshworks:
Freshworks is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Freshworks!
